tools.description: Look up the Vow language spec. Pass `topic` as a section number (e.g. "3"), a heading keyword, or an error code (e.g. "VOW-E3001"); omit it for the index.

topic.description: Section number, heading keyword, or error code. Empty returns the index.

tools.name: vow_spec

tools.description: Statically check Vow source (syntax + types + effects + contracts). Returns a Diagnostic[] JSON array, each with span, code, and at least one fix candidate.
tools.name: vow_check

tools.description: Format Vow source into canonical form. On a syntax error it does not reformat and returns the Diagnostic[] instead (isError).
tools.name: vow_fmt

tools.description: Search Vow example snippets by keyword (matches path and body). Omit `query` to list all examples.

query.description: Keyword to search example paths and bodies. Empty lists all.

tools.name: vow_examples
